user.title: Smart Thermostat - Core entities
user.description: Choose the air conditioner to manage and the base sensors.

energia.title: Solar and battery
energia.description: All fields are optional: leave them empty to disable automatic surplus-solar turn-on.

data.soc_min: Minimum battery SOC to turn on

data_description.fv_start_time: Outside this time window the thermostat won't turn on or adjust anything.
data_description.fv_end_time: Outside this time window the thermostat won't turn on or adjust anything.

data.turn_on_offset: Minimum offset to turn on from solar
data.temp_delta: Regulation offset (±) applied to the AC
data.window_delay_minutes: Minutes to wait with window open before turning off

notifiche.title: Voice and Telegram alerts
notifiche.description: Choose the Google devices to announce the window alert on and where to send the Telegram notification. Messages support templates (e.g. {{ delay }}, {{ name }}, {{ target }}).

data.tts_media_players: Google devices for the voice announcement
data.notify_targets: Notify/Telegram entities to send the alert to
data.notify_chat_ids: Telegram chat IDs (only if you have no notify entities)

data_description.tts_message_open: Available variables: {{ delay }} wait minutes, {{ name }} thermostat name, {{ target }} target temperature.
data_description.notify_message: Available variables: {{ name }} thermostat name, {{ target }} target temperature.
data_description.notify_chat_ids: One or more chat IDs separated by commas, used only if no notify entity is selected.

abort.already_configured: This air conditioner is already managed by another Smart Thermostat instance.

data.soc_min: Minimum battery SOC to turn on

data.turn_on_offset: Minimum offset to turn on from solar
data.temp_delta: Regulation offset (±) applied to the AC
data.window_delay_minutes: Minutes to wait with window open before turning off

data.tts_media_players: Google devices for the voice announcement
data.notify_targets: Notify/Telegram entities to send the alert to
data.notify_chat_ids: Telegram chat IDs (only if you have no notify entities)
